retrieved_result: Wood Tilt Out Trash or Recycling Cabinet - Solid wood tilt out trash cabinet or recycling cabinet. Easy to build, fully framed, open back, fits standard trash cans. Handmade by: hoffer. Projects built from this plan.
Decision_Reason: The result describes a DIY cabinet plan for trash/recycling storage rather than easy DIY room decoration ideas; it is DIY-related but not focused on decorating a room with decor ideas.
